steps.title: Identify the initial value
steps.content: The exponential function form is $$A(t) = A_0 \cdot r^t$$ where $A_0$ is the initial balance. The account opens with \$35,600.00, so $A_0 = 35,600.00$. This coefficient eliminates choices C and D, which both have \$94,072.38 instead.

steps.title: Select the growth factor and verify
steps.content:
The balance grows from \$35,600.00 to \$129,672.38 over 15 years, so the growth factor $r$ must exceed 1. The factor 1.09 represents 9% annual growth; 0.09 would shrink the balance rapidly.

Verify: $A(15) = 35,600.00(1.09)^{15}$. Since $(1.09)^{15} \approx 3.6425$, we have $A(15) \approx 129,672.38$, matching the given data. That matches choice A — A is correct.
